---
title: "Jan 22 Quarto Demo"
author: Isabelle Leavy
format: html
---

## This is my test quarto file

The following code will do something. 

# Standard code block
```{r}
x <- 1
print(x)
log(-x)
```

# Exclude the source code
```{r}
#| echo: false
x <- 2
print(x)
log(-x)
```

# Exclude output
```{r}
#| eval: false
x <- 3
print(x)
log(-x)
```

# Exclude warnings
```{r}
#| warning: false
x <- 4
print(x)
log(-x)
```

# Suppress everything 
```{r}
#| include: false
x <- 5
print(x)
log(-x)
```

# Add figure
```{r}
#| out-width: "90%"
knitr::include_graphics("img/wanna_see_the_code_2x.png")
```

{r}
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "4in"
knitr::include_graphics("img/norm_normal_file_format_2x.png")
```
